evidence.title: README (segment 2)
evidence.excerpt:
🦀 **Rust CLI**: Command-line tool for shell scripting and automation
🐍 **Python SDK**: Python bindings for integration in Python applications

evidence.title: README (segment 4)
evidence.excerpt: > [!IMPORTANT] > This project targets the **NotebookLM Enterprise API** only. Google hasn’t published an API for the consumer edition or general Google Workspace tenants as of 2025-10-25.

evidence.title: README (segment 5)
evidence.excerpt: In September 2025, Google released the [NotebookLM Enterprise API](https://cloud.google.com/gemini/enterprise/notebooklm-enterprise/docs/overview), enabling programmatic access to NotebookLM features for the first time.

evidence.title: README (segment 6)
evidence.excerpt: While you can interact with the API using simple `curl` commands, this approach has several limitations that this project addresses:

evidence.title: README (segment 7)
evidence.excerpt: - **Problem**: Managing OAuth tokens, handling token refresh, and ensuring secure credential storage - **Solution**: Seamless `gcloud` CLI integration with automatic token caching and refresh

evidence.title: README (segment 8)
evidence.excerpt: - **Problem**: Writing JSON payloads by hand, managing resource names, and handling API versioning - **Solution**: Type-safe CLI flags and Python SDK with intelligent defaults and validation

evidence.title: v0.2.3
evidence.excerpt: ## What's Changed * refactor(env): centralize profile experiment flag logic and enhance tests by @K-dash in https://github.com/K-dash/nblm-rs/pull/95 * feat(auth): implement OAuth2 client configuration and browser flow by @K-dash in https://github.com/K-dash/nblm-rs/pull/96 * feat(auth): enhance OAuth2 support with UserOAuthProvider and related functionality by @K-dash in https://github.com/K-dash/nblm-rs/pull/97 * feat: add auth command to CLI for authentication management by @K-dash in https://github.com/K-dash/nblm-rs/pull/98 **Full Changelog**: https://github.com/K-dash/nblm-rs/compare/v0.2.2...v0.2.3

evidence.title: v0.2.2

evidence.title: v0.2.1
evidence.excerpt: ## What's Changed * feat: update version handling and import compatibility in nblm package by @K-dash in https://github.com/K-dash/nblm-rs/pull/78 * feat: add command availability checks and color output to diagnostics by @K-dash in https://github.com/K-dash/nblm-rs/pull/79 * feat: enhance doctor command with Google Drive access validation and JSON flag handling by @K-dash in https://github.com/K-dash/nblm-rs/pull/80 * fix: update test assertions for colored markers in diagnostics by @K-dash in https://github.com/K-dash/nblm-rs/pull/81 **Full Changelog**: https://github.com/K-dash/nblm-rs/compare/v0.2.0...v0.2.1
